composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py to ensure full functionality of the Flask backend for SmartHomeManager. Specifically, fix the dashboard() function issue by integrating with the newly created dashboard.html template. Maintain all existing routes and data handling logic, ensuring proper reading and writing of local text files in the 'data' directory. Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure the backend routes correctly correspond to the frontend templates and their elements as specified in the requirements document.
composition.Programmer 2: Implement all missing HTML template files for the SmartHomeManager web application in the Flask 'templates' directory. This includes creating dashboard.html, device_list.html, add_device.html, device_control.html, automation.html, energy_report.html, and activity_logs.html. Each template must strictly follow the page design and element IDs specified in the requirements document to ensure seamless integration with the backend routes and frontend functionality. Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that template elements match backend data and routing expectations.
